message:
fix(durable-state,connector-registry): atomic rollback and trust policy hardening

durable_state.rs:
- Defer pre-rollback checkpoint creation until after validation passes,
  preventing checkpoint pollution when rollback is rejected
- Rebuild the connector registry from scratch via LifecycleRegistry::new()
  during rollback instead of incremental patching, which was fragile when
  multiple connectors changed between checkpoints
- Formatting cleanup across the module

connector_registry.rs:
- Add TrustLevel::rank() returning numeric ordering and meets_minimum()
  for threshold comparisons, replacing scattered match blocks
- Derive Eq on ConnectorManifest for cleaner equality checks
- Use case-insensitive digest comparison (eq_ignore_ascii_case) when
  verifying connector integrity, preventing false mismatches from
  mixed-case hex encodings
- Prevent silent replacement of the active connector version — if a
  registration would overwrite a different active version, return an
  error instead of silently replacing it

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
